title: Each That We Lose Takes Part Of Us;
content:
Each that we lose takes part of us;
    A crescent still abides,
    Which like the moon, some turbid night,
    Is summoned by the tides.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "Each That We Lose Takes Part Of Us;"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
